project: Dashboard has no test files. Create test suite for React components using React Testing Library and Vitest. Add tests for: LoginForm (submit with valid/invalid credentials), JobList (render jobs, filter functionality), DeviceList (display devices, status indicators), DocumentList (upload, delete actions), Dashboard home (stats display). Create web/dashboard/src/__tests__/ directory. Add test setup in web/dashboard/vitest.config.ts. Ensure npm run test passes with at least 70% coverage.
